baseline_recovered_results.notes: Minimal baseline-only results artifact reconstructed from the successful baseline portion of job 25269 so later runs could use --skip-baseline.

baseline_source_log.notes: Contains the original successful baseline measurements later normalized into the recovered baseline-only artifact.

unaligned_checkpoint.notes: True unaligned PaLU checkpoint built with rank_block_size=1, preserving non-aligned ranks.

aligned_checkpoint_build_summary.notes: GAC alignment metadata for the final aligned PaLU checkpoint used in the completed comparison run.

completed_comparison_run.notes: Completed A100 comparison run containing the unaligned PaLU and aligned GAC benchmark results.

latency_comparison_summary.notes: Normalizes the final baseline / unaligned / aligned_gac PaLU A100 evidence into the common comparison-shaped summary used by the other method bundles.

paper_a100_sources.notes: Checked-in paper table with A100 baseline/ASVD/LLM-Pruner latency numbers.
Checked-in slide table with A100 prefill/decode summary.
